item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-current-state --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-current-state --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"big_bang\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'current_plan_exact=PASS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
done
printf '"'current_docs_values=PASS\\n'
plan_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_count="'$(rg -oF '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_count" = 1 && test "$docs_count" = 1
printf '"'current_phase3_counts=PASS plan:%s docs:%s\\n' \""'$plan_count" "$docs_count"
printf '"'current_hashes\\n'
shasum -a 256 \""'$plan" "$docs"
printf '"'CURRENT_STATE_COMPARISON=PASS\\n'"
